---
title: "Mohammad Sayeef Alam"
page-layout: full
image: images/pic2.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20rem
  image-shape: round
  
  id: ppc
---

:::{#ppc}

## About me

I am currently pursuing research on the genetics of celiac disease as a PhD candidate in the [Department of Public Health and Nursing](https://www.ntnu.edu/ism) at the [Norwegian University of Science and Technology](https://www.ntnu.edu/). My focus has been to analyse complex genetic datasets and determine novel association and work towards precision medicine. 

Previously I was employed at [Parexel](https://www.parexel.com/) as an Associate in the Advanced Analytics team. I was involved mostly in development of RShiny apps for clients which could perform cost-effectiveness analysis. Apart from this I was also involved in several other statistical analysis.

I am passionate about leveraging programming and statistical software to solve complex healthcare challenges. My proficiency in R and RShiny allows me to create interactive data visualizations and develop robust statistical pipelines, enhancing both the efficiency and interpretability of research outcomes.

## Core Competencies

* Advanced statistical analysis and modeling
* Genomic data interpretation and manipulation
* Health economic modeling and outcome research
* R/RShiny development for interactive data applications
* Machine learning applications in healthcare
* Data-driven decision making in clinical settings

<!--
## Education

| Degree | Specialization | Year | Institution |
|--------|----------------|------|-------------|
| PhD (ongoing) | Genetics of Celiac Disease | Present | Norwegian University of Science and Technology |
| M. Phil. | Biostatistics and Demography | 2021 | International Institute for Population Sciences |
| M. Sc. | Biostatistics and Demography | 2020 | International Institute for Population Sciences |
| B. Sc. | Statistics | 2018 | [Your Undergraduate Institution] |
-->

:::
